NL.R1: The customer should receive an automated email notification when his personal data is collected by the ‘credit bureau service’
NL.R2: The checking of the customer bank privilege that is followed by checking of her credit worthiness must take place before determining the risk level of the loan application
NL.R3: The activity ‘customer bank privilege check’ (to be performed by credit broker or supervisor) should be segregated from ‘credit worthiness check’ (to be performed by post-processing clerk)
NL.R4: The branch office manager checks whether risks are acceptable and makes either the final approval or rejection of the request
NL.R5: The offer in the signed loan contract is valid for 7 working days and afterwards it is closed
NL.R6: If the loan request’s credit exceeds 1 million Euro (1M e) the clerk supervisor checks the credit worthiness of the customer. The lack of the supervisor check immediately creates a suspense file. In case of failure of the creation of a suspense file, the manager is notified by the system
NL.R7: Checking banking privileges is optional for trusted (gold) customers. If a trusted (gold) customer’s loan request is less than 1M Euros, the evaluation of the loan risk is not performed

Humanmade.R1: parallel('send automated email', 'check credit worthiness') and executed_by('check credit worthiness', 'credit bureau service')
Humanmade.R2: precedence('evaluate loan risk', 'customer bank privilege check') and precedence('evaluate loan risk', 'check credit worthiness') and leads_to('customer bank privilege check', 'check credit worthiness')
Humanmade.R3: executed_by('customer bank privilege check', 'credit broker') or executed_by('customer bank privilege check', 'supervisor') and executed_by('check credit worthiness', 'data.post_processing_resource') and executed_by_return('customer bank privilege check') != executed_by_return('credit worthiness check')
Humanmade.R4: executed_by('evaluate loan risk', 'manager') and executed_by('officially sign loan contract', 'manager')
Humanmade.R5: max_time_between('officially sign loan contract', 'perform loan settlement', 604800)
